sqlMap.select: SELECT REGDATE, B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND DTIME != 0 AND B.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY B.FORMID, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# AND DTIME != '0' AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #company# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND B.DTIME != 0 AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #company# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY USERID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND A.CN = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY CN, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN TBL_FORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate#
(DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR SUSININGCNT != 0 OR SUSINENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0)
(DRAFTTIME != 0)
A.FORMNAME LIKE '%' || #searchList# || '%'
GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2

SELECT B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT, NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) AS DRAFTEND, CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND( DTIME / DRAFTEND,2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTEND, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) AND A.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY FORMID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# ORDER BY CN, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , NVL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , NVL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , NVL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , NVL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , NVL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #company# AND ( DRAFTCNT != '0' OR DRAFTINGCNT != '0' OR DRAFTENDCNT != '0' OR RETURNCNT != '0' ) AND B.USERID = #searchID# ORDER BY USERID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) ORDER BY REGDATE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'DAY' DAY , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , TO_CHAR(CONNECTTIME + ($offSet$/24), 'hh24') DATE_ , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CONNECTTIME + $offSet$/24, 'hh24')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'TOTAL' TOTAL , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , TO_CHAR(CONNECTTIME+$offSet$/24, 'hh24') DATE_ , 0 FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CONNECTTIME+$offSet$/24, 'hh24') ) A ORDER BY A.DATE_, A.DAY

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , CONNECTBROWSER , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY CONNECTBROWSER ORDER BY COUNT(SEQUENCE) DESC

SELECT 'OS' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , CONNECTOS , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY CONNECTOS
UNION ALL
SELECT 'BIT' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , '64BIT' CONNECTOS , 0 TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTAGENT LIKE '%WOW64%' AND CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION ALL
SELECT 'BIT' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , '32BIT' CONNECTOS , 0 TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTAGENT NOT LIKE '%WOW64%' AND CONNECTTIME >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND CONNECTTIME < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TRIM(COMPANYID) = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TYPE DESC, CONNECTCNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, USERID, USERNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #today# , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , CN , DISPLAYNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , NVL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , NVL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , NVL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , NVL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , NVL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , NVL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , NVL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , TBA.TENANT_ID, TBA.COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , TENANT_ID , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_USERMASTER ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB2.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC2.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDC , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDC , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBD.WRITERIDC ) AA )

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMCONTID, FORMCONTNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #today# , FORMID , FORMNAME , FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , AA.TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , NVL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , NVL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , NVL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , NVL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , NVL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , NVL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , NVL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , TBA.TENANT_ID , TBA.COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT A.FORMCONTID FORMCONTID , B.FORMCONTNAME FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , A.TENANT_ID , A.COMPANYID FROM TBL_FORMINFO A JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = B.FORMCONTID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB2.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC2.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBD.FORMIDA ) AA )

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, USERID, USERNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID )
(SELECT TODAY , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , CN , DISPLAYNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT
CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , NVL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , NVL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , NVL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , NVL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , NVL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , NVL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , NVL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID ,
TODAY FROM
(
select TBA.CN, TSB.DISPLAYNAME, TSB.DESCRIPTION, TBA.DEPARTMENT, TBA.TENANT_ID, TBA.COMPANYID, DINGCNT , SINGCNT , DENDCNT , SENDCNT , DENDTIME , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TBA.TODAY
from (SELECT TAS.CN,
TAS.DEPARTMENT, TAS.TENANT_ID, TAS.COMPANYID, TAS.TODAY FROM (SELECT WRITERID CN,
WRITERDEPTID DEPARTMENT, TENANT_ID TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') TODAY FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE STARTDATE is not null AND WRITERID is not null AND WRITERDEPTID is not null
UNION SELECT WRITERID,
WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') TODAY
FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE ENDDATE is not null AND WRITERID is not null AND WRITERDEPTID is not null
) TAS
GROUP BY CN, DEPARTMENT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY
) TBA
JOIN
TBL_USERMASTER TSB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSB.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND TBA.CN = TSB.CN
LEFT JOIN
( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA ,
NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB.WRITERIDA AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBB.WRITERDEPTIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA2 , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB2.WRITERIDA AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBB2.WRITERDEPTIDA2 AND TBA.TODAY = TBB2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001'
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC.WRITERIDB AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBC.WRITERDEPTIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB2 , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011'
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC2.WRITERIDB AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBC2.WRITERDEPTIDB2 AND TBA.TODAY = TBC2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDC , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDC , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBD.WRITERIDC AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBD.WRITERDEPTIDC AND TBA.TODAY = TBD.NOWDATE ) AA) asd)

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMCONTID, FORMCONTNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID )
(SELECT TODAY , FORMID , FORMNAME , FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , NVL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , NVL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , NVL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , NVL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , NVL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , NVL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , NVL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TODAY FROM ( SELECT TSC.FORMCONTID, TBA.FORMID, TSB.FORMNAME, TSC.FORMCONTNAME, TBA.TENANT_ID, TBA.COMPANYID, TBA.TODAY, DINGCNT , SINGCNT , DENDCNT , SENDCNT , RETUNCNT , DENDTIME , SENDTIME FROM ( SELECT FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY FROM (SELECT
FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') TODAY FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE STARTDATE is not null AND FORMID is not null
UNION SELECT
FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') TODAY
FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE ENDDATE is not null AND FORMID is not null
)AA GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY ) TBA
JOIN TBL_FORMINFO TSB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TSB.FORMID
JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER TSC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID AND TSB.FORMCONTID = TSC.FORMCONTID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB.NOWDATE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB2.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC.FORMIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC2.FORMIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , NVL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YY-MM-DD')) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBD.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBD.NOWDATE) AA) asd)

INSERT INTO TBL_YEARLYDOCCOUNT (DOC_COUNT, MONTH_TYPE, DOC_TYPE, CREATE_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) ( SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END MONTH_TYPE, 'OUTRECEIVE' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND FORMID = '9999999999' AND TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYYMM') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-11), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CASE TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(A.DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END MONTH_TYPE, 'OUTSEND' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO R on A.DOCID = R.DOCID WHERE R.RECEIPTPOINTID NOT LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND R.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND R.PROCESSYN IN ('A', 'E', 'H', 'I', 'R', 'S', 'T', 'V', 'Y') GROUP BY CASE TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((A.ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END MONTH_TYPE, 'INSEND' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE FORMID NOT IN ( SELECT FORMID FROM tbl_forminfo WHERE FORMNAME NOT IN ( '기안(원외)', '기안(유통원외)', '감사(원외)', '감사(유통원외)', '서면결의서', '회의록' ) ) AND TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYYMM') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-11), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CASE TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'YYYY') WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') THEN TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'FMMM') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_CHAR((ENDDATE + 9 / 24), 'MM') -12) END )
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOC_COUNT, DOC_TYPE, MONTH_TYPE FROM TBL_YEARLYDOCCOUNT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_USER a USING (SELECT NVL(#userId#, #ip#) AS USER_ID, #ip# AS IPADDRESS, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, #year# AS YEAR, #month# AS MONTH, #day# AS DAY, #hour# AS HOUR, #timeCode# AS TIME_CODE, #menuId# AS MENU_ID, #code# AS CODE, 1 AS STAT_COUNT FROM dual) b ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TIME_CODE = B.TIME_CODE AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.STAT_COUNT = a.STAT_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, IPADDRESS, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (b.USER_ID, b.IPADDRESS, b.TENANT_ID, b.COMPANY_ID, b.YEAR, b.MONTH, b.DAY, b.HOUR, b.TIME_CODE, b.MENU_ID, b.CODE, b.STAT_COUNT)

MERGE INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_USER_MONTH a USING (SELECT NVL(#userId#, #ip#) AS USER_ID, #ip# AS IPADDRESS, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, #year# AS YEAR, #month# AS MONTH, #monthCode# AS TIME_CODE, #menuId# AS MENU_ID, #code# AS CODE, 1 AS STAT_COUNT FROM dual) b ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TIME_CODE = B.TIME_CODE AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.STAT_COUNT = a.STAT_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, IPADDRESS, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (b.USER_ID, b.IPADDRESS, b.TENANT_ID, b.COMPANY_ID, b.YEAR, b.MONTH, b.TIME_CODE, b.MENU_ID, b.CODE, b.STAT_COUNT)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER_MONTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID AS menuId, SUM(STAT_COUNT) AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT a USING (SELECT #deptId# AS DEPT_ID, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, #year# AS YEAR, #month# AS MONTH, #day# AS DAY, #hour# AS HOUR, #timeCode# AS TIME_CODE, #menuId# AS MENU_ID, #code# AS CODE, 1 AS STAT_COUNT FROM dual) b ON (A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TIME_CODE = B.TIME_CODE AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.STAT_COUNT = a.STAT_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (DEPT_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (b.DEPT_ID, b.TENANT_ID, b.COMPANY_ID, b.YEAR, b.MONTH, b.DAY, b.HOUR, b.TIME_CODE, b.MENU_ID, b.CODE, b.STAT_COUNT)

MERGE INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT_MONTH a USING (SELECT #deptId# AS DEPT_ID, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, #year# AS YEAR, #month# AS MONTH, #monthCode# AS TIME_CODE, #menuId# AS MENU_ID, #code# AS CODE, 1 AS STAT_COUNT FROM dual) b ON (A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TIME_CODE = B.TIME_CODE AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.STAT_COUNT = a.STAT_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (DEPT_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (b.DEPT_ID, b.TENANT_ID, b.COMPANY_ID, b.YEAR, b.MONTH, b.TIME_CODE, b.MENU_ID, b.CODE, b.STAT_COUNT)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT_MONTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID AS menuId, SUM(STAT_COUNT) AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID
